description: 真实样本集 — 20 cases sampled from real daily GitHub fetch results. These come from actual 2026-05-29 daily run, WITHOUT pre-written expected values.
note: These are real repos from live GitHub data. No hand-crafted expectations. The benchmark should report confidence levels, not claimed accuracy.

cases.name: gpt-researcher
cases.description: An autonomous agent that conducts deep research on any data using any LLM providers
cases.readme:
## GPT Researcher

An autonomous agent for deep research.

### Installation
pip install gpt-researcher

### Features
- Multi-source research
- Report generation
- Multiple LLM providers

expected.note: High selection score in daily (92.5) — verify it truly deserves this

cases.name: sim
cases.description: Build, deploy, and orchestrate AI agents. Sim is the central intelligence layer for your AI workforce.
cases.readme:
## Sim — AI Agent Platform

Build, deploy, and orchestrate AI agents.

### Installation
docker-compose up -d

### Features
- Agent orchestration
- RAG support
- Multi-model

expected.note: Selection=85.5, business=93.0 — verify business judgment on real data

cases.name: agents
cases.description: Multi-harness agentic plugin marketplace for Claude Code, Codex CLI, Cursor, OpenCode, and Gemini CLI
cases.readme:
## Agents — Multi-Harness Plugin Marketplace

Plugin marketplace for AI coding agents.

### Installation
pip install agents

### Features
- Claude Code plugins
- Codex CLI plugins
- Multi-harness support

expected.note: Selection=84.5, business=92.3 — high AI relevance, verify pool classification

cases.name: huginn

## Huginn

Build agents that monitor and act on your behalf.

Try the demo.

expected.note: Browser automation — verify risk=medium, not high

cases.name: MoneyPrinterTurbo
cases.description: 利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.
